findings.stuck_pattern_consistency: Low since_cmd (0.05-0.08), high out_sim (0.43-1.00), rising cmd_count — consistent across ADP and OpenHands formats
findings.productive_pattern_consistency: High since_cmd (0.80+), neutral out_sim (0.50), low cmd_count — consistent across all sources
findings.tool_mapping: All sources map to same abstract categories. MEnvData lacks 'search' tool (uses bash+grep instead) — acceptable.
findings.menvdata_xml_format: MEnvData uses XML-embedded function calls in content, not tool_calls array. Parser handles both formats.

parser_issues_fixed: MEnvData XML-style function call parsing added to parse_openhands.py

excluded_datasets.orca_agentinstruct: 1M+ entries but only 2-4 steps each — instruction Q&A, not agent trajectories
excluded_datasets.mini-coder: No LICENSE file in ADP repo
